# AWS Labs

Vendor-specific labs are embedded inline within each module's README rather
than housed in separate lab files. Each module walks through the hands-on
exercise alongside the conceptual material.

For practical work, use AWS's own sandbox environments:

- [AWS Skill Builder](https://skillbuilder.aws/) labs and workshops
- [AWS Free Tier](https://aws.amazon.com/free/) account for real-service access

See the [branch README](../README.md) for module order and week plan.
